articleSummary:
This quiz evaluates practical PostgreSQL expertise, testing knowledge of JOIN operations, NULL handling, ANSI SQL compliance, transaction control, internal mechanisms, indexing strategies, and data sampling. It is moderately challenging, blending common tasks with obscure gotchas, and maintains an encouraging, instructional tone. Learners receive immediate feedback and a sense of achievement upon completion.
Topics: JOINs, NULL values, ANSI SQL standards, Transactions, PostgreSQL internals, Indexing, Data sampling
Audience: Developers, database administrators, and data engineers with intermediate PostgreSQL experience seeking to deepen their mastery.

chunks.label: intro
outro
chunks.text:
よくやった！PostgreSQLのさまざまな領域を深く掘り下げましたね！ 🐘  

何か新しいことを学んだか、少なくとも自慢できるスコアを手に入れたでしょう！ 🏆  

もっと刺激が欲しいですか？ 無限の*楽しさを求めて私の[クイズコレクション](../challenges/)をチェックしてください！

articleSummary:
The quiz assesses practical PostgreSQL knowledge, testing skills in JOIN operations, handling NULLs, ANSI SQL compliance, transaction management, internal mechanisms, indexing strategies, and data sampling. It is moderately challenging, offering a mix of familiar concepts and obscure gotchas, and maintains an encouraging, instructional tone. The quiz aims to reinforce learning while providing a fun, competitive experience.
Topics: JOIN, NULL handling, ANSI SQL, Transactions, PostgreSQL internals, Indexing, Data sampling
Audience: Developers, database administrators, and data engineers with intermediate PostgreSQL experience who want to deepen their expertise.

chunks.label: intro
outro
chunks.text:
Gut gemacht! Du hast in mehreren Bereichen von PostgreSQL tief gegraben! 🐘  

Ich hoffe, du hast etwas Neues gelernt oder zumindest eine Punktzahl erzielt, über die du prahlen kannst! 🏆  

Lust auf mehr Nervenkitzel? Sieh dir meine [Quiz‑Sammlung](/challenges/) für endlosen* Spaß an!

articleSummary:
The quiz assesses PostgreSQL proficiency by testing knowledge of joins, NULL handling, ANSI SQL compliance, transaction management, internal mechanisms, indexing strategies, and data sampling. It is positioned at an intermediate to advanced difficulty, offering a supportive yet challenging tone that encourages learning and self‑assessment. The content is designed to reinforce both common and obscure PostgreSQL concepts.
Topics: JOIN operations, NULL handling, ANSI SQL standards, Transactions, PostgreSQL internals, Indexing, Data sampling
Audience: Developers, database administrators, and data engineers who already have basic SQL experience and want to deepen their PostgreSQL expertise.

chunks.label: intro
chunks.text:
--- import Challenge from '../../../components/QuizUI/Challenge'; import QuizUI from '../../../components/QuizUI/QuizUI'; > **الجزء 2 من 2.** [العودة إلى الجزء 1](../quiz-postgres-sql-mastery-pt1/)

مرحبًا بك في الجزء 2 من اختبار Deep Postres Quiz الخاص بي!

يغطي هذا الاختبار مزيجًا من ميزات PostgreSQL المألوفة والأقل شهرة والمفاجآت: `JOIN`، `NULL`، SQL القياسي (ANSI)، المعاملات، التفاصيل الداخلية، الفهرسة، أخذ عينات البيانات... والمزيد! حظ سعيد! 🍀 ---

chunks.label: outro
chunks.text:
أحسنت! لقد تعمقت في عدة مجالات من PostgreSQL! 🐘

أتمنى أن تكون قد تعلمت شيئًا جديدًا، أو على الأقل حصلت على درجة تتفاخر بها! 🏆

هل تريد المزيد من الإثارة في الحياة؟ اطّلع على [مجموعة الاختبارات](../challenges/) للمتعة التي لا تنتهي*!

articleSummary:

Topics: JOIN, NULL, ANSI SQL, Transactions, Internals, Indexing, Data Sampling
Audience: Intermediate to advanced PostgreSQL developers and database enthusiasts

chunks.text:
--- import Challenge from '../../../components/QuizUI/Challenge'; import QuizUI from '../../../components/QuizUI/QuizUI'; > **חלק 2 מתוך 2.** [חזרה לחלק 1](../quiz-postgres-sql-mastery-pt1/)

רוצה עוד ריגושים בחיים? בדוק את [אוסף החידונים](../challenges/) לכיף אינסופי*!

chunks.label: intro
chunks.text:
import Challenge from '../../../../components/QuizUI/Challenge'; import QuizUI from '../../../../components/QuizUI/QuizUI'; --- > **Partie 2 sur 2.** [Retour à la partie 1](../quiz-postgres-sql-mastery-pt1/)

Bienvenue dans la deuxième partie de mon quiz PostgreSQL approfondi !

Ce quiz explore un mélange de fonctionnalités familières et méconnues de PostgreSQL, ainsi que ses pièges classiques : `JOIN`, `NULL`, SQL ANSI, transactions, fonctionnement interne, indexation, échantillonnage de données... et plus encore ! Bonne chance ! 🍀 ---

chunks.label: outro
chunks.text:
---
Bien joué ! Vous avez exploré en profondeur plusieurs facettes de PostgreSQL ! 🐘

J'espère que vous avez appris quelque chose de nouveau, ou au moins que vous avez obtenu un score digne de ce nom ! 🏆

Envie de plus de sensations fortes ? Allez voir ma [Collection de Quiz](../challenges/) pour un plaisir* sans fin !
---

articleSummary:
This quiz tests deep knowledge of PostgreSQL features and gotchas, covering both familiar and lesser-known topics. It is designed for intermediate to advanced users, with a fun and encouraging tone. Key areas include JOINs, NULL handling, ANSI SQL, transactions, internals, indexing, and data sampling.
Topics: JOIN, NULL, ANSI SQL, Transactions, Internals, Indexing, Data Sampling
Audience: PostgreSQL developers and database administrators

chunks.label: intro
chunks.text:
--- import Challenge from '../../../components/QuizUI/Challenge'; import QuizUI from '../../../components/QuizUI/QuizUI'; > **第二部分（共两部分）。** [返回第一部分](/quiz-postgres-sql-mastery-pt1/)

欢迎来到我的深度 PostgreSQL 测验第二部分！

本测验涵盖了 PostgreSQL 中一些常见与冷门的功能和陷阱：`JOIN`、`NULL`、ANSI SQL、事务、内部原理、索引、数据采样……以及更多！ 祝你好运！🍀 ---

chunks.label: outro
chunks.text:
干得好！你在 PostgreSQL 的多个领域都深入探索了！🐘

希望你学到了新东西，或者至少拿到了一个可以炫耀的分数！🏆

想要更多刺激？来看看我的[测验合集](../challenges/)，享受无穷无尽的乐趣！*
